name_en: M20250 Monogram This Slim Trunk handbag draws inspiration from the Louis Vuitton classic trunk, incorporating riveted borders and metal S-lock buckles into soft calfskin, showcasing a rock-chic style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. Dimensions: 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
